temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a modern, sterile conference room, four men in white shirts and ties are seated around a long table. On the far left, a man in a security guard uniform stands with his hands on his hips, watching a security monitor. The monitor displays a grainy, black-and-white feed of a person in a dark shirt walking down a hallway. (Storyline: The scene is set in a security briefing room, introducing a team of security personnel and a senior figure. The security monitor is showing a live feed of a person of interest, establishing the initial premise of a security incident.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, factual. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:08) The camera cuts to a medium shot of the security guard standing by the monitor. He is wearing a white shirt, a dark tie, and a security lanyard. He looks intently at the monitor as he speaks, reporting the incident to the team seated at the table. (Storyline: The security guard provides a crucial piece of information: a person jumped from a building just before the security team arrived. This raises the stakes and introduces the central conflict.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, informative. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
